get.summary: ListProducts returns a paginated list of all products.

parameters.name: pagination.page
parameters.description: page is the 1-indexed page number to fetch (minimum: 1).

parameters.name: pagination.pageSize
parameters.description: page_size is the maximum number of items per page (maximum: 100).

post.summary: CreateProduct creates a new product in the catalog.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateProductRequest carries the data needed to create a new product.

get.summary: GetProduct retrieves a single product by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id is the unique identifier of the product to retrieve (UUID v4).

delete.summary: DeleteProduct removes a product from the catalog permanently.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id is the unique identifier of the product to delete (UUID v4).

patch.summary:
UpdateProduct partially updates an existing product using FieldMask semantics.
Only fields listed in update_mask are modified.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id is the unique identifier of the product to update (required).

updateMask.title:
update_mask specifies which fields of `product` to update.
If update_mask is empty, all fields in `product` will be updated.
Field paths: "name", "description", "price_cents", "stock"

product.description:
product contains the new field values. Only fields listed in
update_mask are applied. Other fields are ignored.

ProductServiceUpdateProductBody.description:
UpdateProductRequest carries partial update data for an existing product.
Only fields specified in update_mask will be modified.

createdAt.description: created_at is the RFC 3339 timestamp when the resource was created.

createdBy.description: created_by is the identifier of the user or system that created the resource.

updatedAt.description: updated_at is the RFC 3339 timestamp when the resource was last updated.

updatedBy.description: updated_by is the identifier of the user or system that last updated the resource.

v1AuditInfo.description: AuditInfo carries standard audit timestamps and actor information.

httpStatusCode.description: http_status_code mirrors the HTTP status code (e.g. 200, 400, 404, 500).

isSuccess.description: is_success indicates whether the operation completed successfully.

message.description: message is a human-readable description of the result.

validationErrors.description:
validation_errors contains field-level validation error details,
populated when http_status_code is 400.

v1BaseResponse.description:
BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all RPC calls.
It carries HTTP status, a human-readable message, and optional validation errors.

name.description: name is the display name of the product (required, max 255 chars).

description.description: description is the long-form description (optional, max 2000 chars).

priceCents.description: price_cents is the price in the smallest currency unit (required, min 0).

stock.description: stock is the initial inventory quantity (required, min 0).

v1CreateProductRequest.description: CreateProductRequest carries the data needed to create a new product.

base.description: base contains the operation status and any error details.

product.description: product is the newly created product.

v1CreateProductResponse.description: CreateProductResponse returns the newly created product.

base.description: base contains the operation status and any error details.
base contains the operation status and any error details.
base contains the operation status and any error details.

products.description: products is the list of products on the current page.

pagination.description: pagination contains metadata about the total result set.

v1ListProductsResponse.description: ListProductsResponse returns a paginated list of products.

page.description: page is the 1-indexed page number to fetch (minimum: 1).

pageSize.description: page_size is the maximum number of items per page (maximum: 100).

currentPage.description: current_page is the page number returned in this response.

pageSize.description: page_size is the number of items requested per page.

totalItems.description: total_items is the total number of items across all pages.

totalPages.description: total_pages is the total number of pages available.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse carries pagination metadata in list responses.

id.description: id is the unique identifier of the product (UUID v4).

name.description: name is the display name of the product.

description.description: description is the long-form description of the product.

priceCents.title:
price_cents is the product price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD).
Using integer avoids floating-point precision issues with monetary values.
Example: 1999 = $19.99 USD

stock.description: stock is the current available quantity in inventory.

audit.description: audit contains creation and modification metadata.

v1Product.description: Product represents a single product entity in the catalog.

base.description: base contains the operation status and any error details.

product.description: product is the product after the update has been applied.

v1UpdateProductResponse.description: UpdateProductResponse returns the product after the update.

field.description: field is the name of the request field that failed validation.

message.description: message describes why the field failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError describes a single field-level validation failure.
